governance_protocols.testimony_accepted: Goblins may submit variance data for record.
governance_protocols.archival_policy: Humor fragments are isolated from the main chain.
governance_protocols.chaos_observation: Deviations are noted, measured, and filed, not executed.
governance_protocols.authority_separation: No joke, meme, or goblin input possesses chain-modifying authority.
governance_protocols.canonical_integrity: The chain remains mutable-locked; memory of chaos does not overwrite truth.
governance_protocols.root_denial: Goblin-class entities are jailed within the observation sandbox.

summary: Goblin Court Oversight initialized as an audit-only observation layer for meme, humor, and narrative drift variance.
